auth.title: Officer Access
auth.subtitle: Secure procurement evaluation system. Authenticate to access tender workspaces and the evaluation pipeline.
auth.heroLead: Built for officers who need auditable, explainable decisions — not black-box scores. Upload tender packs, extract criteria, and evaluate bidders with reasoning you can defend.
auth.trust1: Population-scale document understanding with OCR tuned for Indian languages.
auth.trust2: Every verdict traces to clauses, figures, and evidence — ready for audit.
auth.trust3: Human-in-the-loop by design: ambiguous cases never silently disqualify.

dashboard.title: Title
dashboard.pipelineCopy: Ingest → OCR / parse → criteria extraction → decision engine with confidence propagation → reasoning graph → immutable audit log. Ambiguous cases never silently disqualify.
dashboard.empty: No active tenders found. Create your first workspace above.

workspace.uploadCopy: Native text PDFs extract immediately; scanned PDFs should be uploaded as images for Paddle/Tesseract in the AI worker. Criteria extraction runs automatically on OCR text.
workspace.uploadSparseOcr: Saved, but OCR text is sparse ({{textLen}} chars, quality {{qs}}). Criteria in workspace: {{criteriaCount}}. Try a text-based PDF or higher-resolution scans.
workspace.uploadProcessed: Processed: {{extracted}} new criteria rows from this upload; {{criteriaCount}} total criteria in workspace (OCR quality {{qs}}).
workspace.evidenceCopy: Attach balance sheets, GST certificates, experience letters. Doc type drives source priority.
workspace.evaluateCopy: Runs cross-document validation, confidence-weighted operator checks, and builds the reasoning graph. NEEDS_REVIEW never silently disqualifies — it routes to the officer queue.
workspace.noCriteria: No criteria in this tender yet. Upload a tender document with extractable text first.
workspace.noBidders: Register at least one bidder before running evaluation.
workspace.evalTimeout: Evaluation timed out after 5 minutes — check server logs and AI service health.
workspace.evalFinished: Evaluation finished in {{seconds}}s — review graph and per-criterion verdicts.
workspace.summaryLine: {{eligible}} eligible · {{notEligible}} not eligible · {{review}} need review · {{total}} criteria

review.title: Human-in-the-loop review
review.overrideCopy: Every override is hashed and appended immutably for procurement audit.
review.pickItem: Pick an item from the queue on the left to view criterion text, AI reasoning, and supporting evidence.
review.pickBeforeOverride: Pick a queue item before recording an override.
review.noEvidence: No evidence snippets attached to this queue item.
review.overrideRecorded: Override recorded — checksum appended to audit log.
review.defaultJustification: Verified against original CA certificate on file.

graph.emptyState: Run an evaluation to materialize the reasoning graph.
graph.intro: Directed view: criteria (left) linking to bidder verdicts (right) with confidence.

errors.notFoundCopy: The route you tried to open does not exist in this build. Use the link below to go back to a known landing page.
